                                    Software Engineer Expert - R&D
Software Engineer Expert – R&D
Workload: 100%
Location: Losone
Job type: Unlimited
Your tasks
Develop and maintain HMI software aligned with EDM machine requirements and user experience standards.
Comfortable handling complex mathematical and algorithmic challenges, particularly in analytical 3D geometry — a core 
requirement for geometric processing in EDM software.
Interface with Real-Time & PLC teams to define, validate, and improve new functionalities.
Ensure software quality through testing, documentation, and structured code reviews.
Participate in technical workshops, cross-team validations, and support knowledge-sharing across engineering teams.
Your profile
Master's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent technical field.
Proven experience in industrial software environments, at least 3 years.
Strong background in Object-Oriented architecture, UML, and OO programming (C# / .NET); experience in HMI development 
(WPF / XAML).
Good understanding of the full software development lifecycle, quality assurance, and Agile / Scrum methodologies.
Structured, autonomous, and collaborative working style; customer-oriented and resilient under pressure.
Fluent in English and Italian.
AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader 
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.
Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a 
dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career.
Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global 
learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses.
Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a 
sustainable future together.
UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools 
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, 
and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized 
solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support.
UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R.
UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites 
worldwide.
Your contact
Mollar
HR Business Partner

Via Zandone 1

                                    Electronic Engineer - R&D
Electronic Engineer – R&D
Workload: 100%
Location: Losone
Job type: Unlimited
Your tasks
Design, develop, test, and maintain power, analog, and digital electronics for current and next-generation generator 
hardware platforms for EDM (electro discharge) machines.
Acquire and develop process control know-how on EDM machines, including troubleshooting and process analysis, 
contributing to customer/field case resolution and working closely with application development teams.
Support component homologation, database management, and purchasing activities for new and second-source components.
Collaborate with Production teams on test system development and pre-series activities.
Contribute to compliance with relevant standards throughout the hardware development lifecycle.
Your profile
Master's degree in Electronic Engineering.
Proven experience, at least 2 years, in analog, power, and digital electronics design; knowledge of VHDL and 
electronic simulation tools.
Familiarity with measurement equipment (multimeters, oscilloscopes) and programming languages (C, C++, C#, ).
Knowledge of Matlab/Simulink; FMEA and quality processes are a plus.
Methodical and rigorous approach, strong team orientation, and genuine drive for continuous improvement.
Fluent in Italian; technical English (oral and written) is required.
AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader 
in wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM. Its automation-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance.
Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a 
dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career.
Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global 
learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses.
Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a 
sustainable future together.
UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools 
manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, 
and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized 
solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support.

                                    Metrology Technician

Workload: 100%

Location: Losone

Job type: Unlimited

Your tasks

- Perform dimensional and functional measurements mainly within the inspection and final testing area, ensuring 
accuracy, repeatability, and compliance with quality standards.
- Execute measurements using advanced metrology systems (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) and related software environments 
(Calypso, Quindos).
- Define, optimize, and standardize measurement programs and inspection methods in line with AUKOM methodology and ISO 
GPS standards.
